reviews.review_description:
This game has an exceptional sense of presence; the tables are realistic and detailed, and the environments are really cool albeit distracting (many pinballs were lost while looking at the submarines and spaceships hovering around). I wish the additional tables didn't cost extra money but it makes sense considering how much real pinball tables would cost. 
Using an S7 edge and beboncool controller
I purchased 3 new pinball machines and they appear on my dashboard but it stalls at the download. Makes me wish I didn't spend the money on the in game purchases now.
Terrible. It turns off every 2 minutes.

developer_response.body: Hi! If you experience technical problems with the game, please contact us at support@zenstudios.com. We'd be happy to help you! Thanks!

reviews.review_title: Tables are amazing! Oculus Go player
reviews.review_description:
I wrote a review with just a couple complaints and then I spent more time with the game and had to change my review. This game is awesome and the tables are truly amazing! I still wish they would offer a bundled game discount but these tables are so awesome that they are worth the one time price you pay for each. I have bought them all.

Now, to hopefully help others like myself out there figure out a few things quicker...
First, you really need to use a game pad with this game. You can use the Oculus controller, but it’s a bit awkward. I am using a SteelSeries Stratus XL. Took some time to get it linked up, but once I did, I love it. You first have to add it as a controller for the Oculus, using the Oculus app from your phone. If you are in the game, go completely out and back in. I also needed to turn the controller off and on again after linking.
There are 3 pinball machines in the room. Look at one and press the A button to start the game. If you have bought more, just use the L1 or R1 button to scroll through the tables you have until you get to the one you want to play. You can also change the 3 available machines from the dashboard. Once in a table, you can press another button (either of the middle arrow buttons on the SteelSeries controller) to open a menu. Use the game pads left/right/up/down control to highlight an option and A to select it. You can get useful table specific information here. B backs you out and X re-centers the table.
One last thing, you can change your viewing option from standing to sitting. I find it better set to sitting. To change this, go to the dashboard, press R1 on the controller to bring up the settings menu, select View mode and press A to change from standing to sitting. There are many features to these tables and menus that help once you figure out how to access them. Just play around with them and you’ll get it. Once you do, you will love this game!

Pinball is absolutely incredible in VR. If you have any interest in pinball, this is a must buy, however it really needs a gamepad. It's frustrating to play with the Go controller. Also note that the ability to use the right stick to pull back the plunger doesn't work with the Xbox gamepad, so you have to use the A button.

Zen Pinball FX2 is so good I bought it twice.  I already own it for PlayStation VR. I miss the six degrees of freedom when playing on the Oculus Go, but having a room full of excellent pinball tables you can take anywhere is really cool.

Easily a five star game.

So I read the reviews before I purchased it. You get three tables which are all well made and entertaining, great graphics, music and sound. The environment around you while you’re playing is so cool. If you want a back to the future table or ET etc you have to pay $4.99 for each. I did the Back to the future and it’s worth it. So animated, the characters interact with the game play as you go and the car flies under the table and around the room even leaving flaming skid marks under the table. To me it is well made, you just have to decide if $4.99 is worth the new Experience at the other tables that are offered. Definitely replay value in this and you have the Oculus buyers guarantee to try it and if you don’t like it you get a refund so why Not play it for under 30 minutes and decide. Great game! Put headphones on and get fully immersed it’s amazing!

Great playability first class graphics...the three free tables are brilliant...bought the jaws table,great pity the offer on the quest is not on the go for the universal bundle,would have bought  it       if you love pinball buy this one. Bought castle storm  and rampage tables brilliant gameplay on both
They are beautiful and well done.

reviews.review_title: NO L2 and R2 funtion on XBOX CONTROLLER
reviews.review_description: IM NOT HAPPY !! on the XBOX controller you can not change your flipper buttons to L2 and R2 in the options... your forced to use L1 and R1, which feels very awkward and uncomfortable... also the manual flipper launch button does not work... SO HOW CAN YOU EXPECT FIVE STAR'S ?? when you launch the game not correctly mapped to the XBOX controller that most people are using.. if you want five stars... THEN PLEASE FIX IT !!. We spent money on this, the least you can do is make it work correctly !

developer_response.body: Hi KylesterWAR! Thanks for leaving feedback! Could you please describe the problem for us at support@zenstudios.com? Maybe we could find a solution to that!

reviews.review_description: Hi, I’ve purchased this on the Go...are you allowing the crossover free to my Quest or are you expecting me to pay again for the same game and purchased tables? Thanks.
Great graphics and play. Good deal for the money.
Awesome, best pin-sim out there by miles, in beautiful, true depth 3D on the Oculus Go
Really nice game, I were able to buy 3 more tables , but now every time I try to buy another table it’s giving me a error.

developer_response.body:
Hi jefferson65! We got reports that purchasing tables were unavailable in the game, however, I was informed that everything should work fine now.
If you would face any problems again, please contact us at support@zenstudios.com

reviews.review_description: The experience of playing pinball in VR with this game is much better than I expected. I even bought three premium tables for 5€ each. They are really well designed and fun to play. The changing surroundings, sound effects and accurate controls make this game addictive. 5 from 5 stars for me.

Really good tables, better graphics than pinball arcade. However, needs a gamepad to play it properly. You do have to buy some tables separately and there are a few negative ratings because of that, but do people really expect something for nothing??

Ok so im new to any video pinball im just a almost 40 year old with some pinball nolstalgic vibes but now that its VR and has some depth to the table its very cool and all boards have GLOBAL leaderboards not just local so THANK YOU even though i will never be top tier having a leaderboard to grind gives just a little extra incentive to play as to "deceptive advertising" before i read any reviews i knew what the package contained because i read the description its very clear to me anyways whats actually being sold bit yet i agree they should not have the banner or thumbnail of game should not be of 3 tables your not buying and i think zen knew it was tricky so i see both sides of the story but i personally didnt feel deceived one bit but for 5$ with 3 quality tables its a good package the physics are spot on they have been making pinball for a long time you can tell
I wish they had more tables
The pinball games are fun and all of the VR around you in the room was amazing. !
Great tables all with the right feel, all I could ask for is more tables. Keep in mind if your going to buy all the tables it’s gonna cost you $50 but every one of them is worth it.

I've been a fan of this game for a while and have many tables purchases on my Xbox one. I've wanted to play this in VR just as long, so as soon as I got an Oculus go it was a must buy. It is everything you could ever want in a virtual reality pinball game. I can't even imagine going back to the Xbox version. But please, if the developers are reading, PLEASE fix the glitch that causes the flippers to not work. That's literally the only thing making this game not perfect. Depending on the control scheme, during play a flipper will not fire until you pause the game and then unpause again. This is a very frustrating glitch that is unacceptable for a game that relies on 2 buttons. It is somewhat managable if you can catch it in time, but it'll still mess you up from time to time. I'll probably still continue to buy tables despite the glitch, but I really hope they fix it.
